categories.title: HIDDEN ANIMALS
categories.theme: Each clue describes a person, place, or thing whose name conceals a hidden animal within it — answer is the ANIMAL hidden inside the name

clues.clue: The famous Mexican dish made with a folded tortilla hides this barnyard animal inside its name.
India's national animal lurks inside the name of this sport associated with athlete Jesse Owens.
The science of Coleopterology hides this six-legged insect right inside the word itself.
A male duck is known by a name that hides a mythical fire-breathing reptile within its four letters.
The capital of Kiribati conceals this large seabird associated with tropical islands within its seven letters.

finals.title: WORD WITHIN A WORD
finals.clue: This 3-letter word can precede 'cord,' 'current,' 'off,' and 'saw' to form compound words — and it is also entirely contained within the name of the hockey team based in Buffalo, New York.
